# RemoPay - AI & LLM Integration Guide

## Overview
RemoPay is a fintech platform enabling users to purchase airtime, data, pay bills, manage wallets, and access virtual cards. This document helps AI agents understand our website structure and interact effectively.

## Website Purpose
- VTU (Virtual Top-Up) services: Airtime, Data, Bills payment
- User wallet management and fund transfers
- Virtual card issuance and management
- Referral program and rewards
- Admin dashboard for platform management

## Main Navigation
- **Public Pages**: Landing, FAQ, Privacy, Terms, Support
- **Auth**: Login, Register, Email Verification, Phone Verification
- **Dashboard**: User dashboard with wallet, airtime, data, bills, transfers
- **Admin**: Admin dashboard, user management, transactions, analytics
- **Agent**: Agent dashboard with customer management and performance metrics

## Key Forms for AI Interaction

### User Registration
- Path: `/auth/register`
- Fields: Email, Password, Phone Number, Full Name
- WebMCP Form: `registration-form`

### Login
- Path: `/auth/login`
- Fields: Email/Phone, Password
- WebMCP Form: `login-form`

### VTU Transactions
- Airtime Purchase: `/dashboard/airtime`
- Data Purchase: `/dashboard/data`
- Bills Payment: `/dashboard/bills`
- TV Subscription: `/dashboard/tv`
- WebMCP Form: `vtu-transaction-form`

### Admin Operations
- User Management: `/admin/users`
- Transactions: `/admin/transactions`
- Analytics: `/admin/analytics`
- WebMCP Table: `admin-users-table`, `admin-transactions-table`

## Accessibility Standards
- ✅ WCAG 2.1 Level AA compliance
- ✅ Semantic HTML structure
- ✅ ARIA labels on interactive elements
- ✅ Keyboard navigation support
- ✅ Screen reader support
- ✅ High contrast ratio (4.5:1 minimum)

## API Endpoints
- Base URL: `https://gateway.remonode.com/remopay/api/v1`
- Authentication: Bearer token (stored in HttpOnly cookies)
- Response Format: JSON with `success`, `message`, `data` fields

## Data Attributes for AI Agents

### Forms
- `data-webmcp-form="[form-name]"` - Identifies form
- `data-webmcp-input="[input-type]"` - Marks form inputs
- `data-webmcp-action="[action-name]"` - Marks action buttons

### Tables
- `data-webmcp-table="[table-name]"` - Identifies data tables
- `data-webmcp-row="[row-id]"` - Marks table rows
- `data-webmcp-field="[field-name]"` - Marks table fields

### Modals & Dialogs
- `data-webmcp-modal="[modal-name]"` - Identifies modals
- `role="dialog"` - Semantic role
- `aria-modal="true"` - Accessibility attribute

### Interactive Elements
- `aria-label="[description]"` - Accessible text for buttons
- `aria-describedby="[id]"` - Additional description
- `data-webmcp-action="[action]"` - Identifies actions

## Common User Journeys

### Purchase Airtime
1. Navigate to Dashboard → Airtime
2. Enter phone number and amount
3. Select provider (MTN, Airtel, 9mobile, Glo)
4. Choose payment method (Wallet, Card)
5. Confirm transaction
6. Receive success notification

### Wallet Transfer
1. Navigate to Dashboard → Transfer
2. Enter recipient phone or username
3. Enter amount
4. Confirm transfer
5. Receive confirmation with reference

### Admin User Management
1. Navigate to Admin → Users
2. Search or filter users
3. View user details, transactions, wallet
4. Take actions: verify, suspend, assign roles
5. Send notifications or emails

## Error Handling
- API errors return 4xx/5xx status codes with `message` field
- Frontend displays user-friendly error messages
- Validation errors include field-specific messages
- Network errors trigger retry mechanisms

## Rate Limiting
- API Rate Limit: 100 requests per minute per user
- WebSocket: 1 connection per user session
- Cache TTL: 5 minutes for dashboard stats

## Security Notes
- All forms use CSRF protection (X-CSRF-Token header)
- Sensitive operations require OTP verification
- Session expires after 30 minutes of inactivity
- Account requires email and phone verification

## Contact & Support
- Support Page: `/support`
- Email: support@remonode.com
- Documentation: https://docs.remonode.com
